title: Whispers in the Void
description: Whispers in the Void is a horror modpack (with Quests) that turns Minecraft into a tense, atmospheric nightmare.
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/WHISPERS_IN_THE_VOID/MP_WHISPERS_IN_THE_VOID_Header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - The **quests files have been added**, but we cannot add FTB Quests to the modpack in Modrinth. You can add it yourself so you can play with them. - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/whispers-in-the-void) version.** ## Whispers in the Void is a horror modpack that turns Minecraft into a tense, atmospheric nightmare. Explore cursed ruins, haunted forests, and forgotten villages where every corner hides something that shouldn’t be there. With mods like Arthropod Phobia Expansions, The End of Herobrine, Born in Chaos, Cave Dweller Reimagined, The Box of Horrors and many others, the world becomes hostile, unpredictable, and deeply unsettling. The sounds will make your skin crawl, the creatures show no mercy, and the feeling of being watched never really goes away. As of update 3.0.0, new quests created by TeamLumenCraft have been released. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/WHISPERS_IN_THE_VOID/MP_WHISPERS_IN_THE_VOID_Description.webp) This modpack not only expands and enhances the core Minecraft experience, but also focuses on delivering a truly terrifying and immersive atmosphere. With a carefully selected collection of horror-themed mods, it guarantees intense moments, unsettling environments, and a constant sense of dread. 😱 Whispers in the Void will drag you into a chilling Minecraft experience — with terrifying mods like The Disturbed, Dark Mist, Void Fog and The Box of Horrors, fear is always just around the corner... 🕷️ Got arachnophobia? You might want to avoid Arthropod Phobia Expansions, or maybe... face your fears 👀 🧟 Classic horror mobs? Absolutely — Cave Dweller Reimagined, The Undead Revamped and Mutant Monsters will make sure you're never truly safe. 🛠️ It’s not all doom and gloom — we’ve added gameplay-enhancing mods like Alex’s Caves, YUNG’s Better Structures, Sophisticated Storage, and Waystones to keep your adventure fun and fluid. 🎧 Total immersion guaranteed: Sound Physics Remastered, Ambient Sounds, and Not Enough Animations bring the world to life (and death). ✅ Fully multiplayer compatible, and yes — shaders work perfectly with Oculus, Complementary Shaders, Hysteria Shaders or Insanity Shader if you want to go full nightmare mode. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/WHISPERS_IN_THE_VOID/MP_WHISPERS_IN_THE_VOID_Faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 4GB or 4096 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 7GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/WHISPERS_IN_THE_VOID/MP_WHISPERS_IN_THE_VOID_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SzPKhMkh/images/68e96a2dce761f3e298b083a92a1f2efac4fd509.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SzPKhMkh/images/fc6758c025c829913e7a25e3afed25f8f6f07ee3.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SzPKhMkh/images/a62a7e80df490438865f8f9fa7d0bbdbee51c486.jpeg) ![Screenshots 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SzPKhMkh/images/52a9063c5ceecbda75385ec9b3b01f8457c75077.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
